emerging_cross_gap_themes.notes: The Series-B+/over-funded penalty is correctly calibrated but fires at scoring time, which is structurally too late — a 5★ thesis-fit can still enter the funnel and consume deal-stage effort. Operational fix: serialise a carding-time stage pre-filter that tags any Series B+ / >$20M-raised candidate as 'validator' before scoring. Recommended in this cycle's scoring-model-health section.
